name: D/D Orthros
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オルトロス
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn: You can target 1 Spell/Trap Card on the field and 1 other "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card you control; destroy them.

[ Monster Effect ] 
When you take battle or effect damage: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned to your field, you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Fiend-Type monsters.
pend_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 Spell/Trap Card on the field and 1 other "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card you control; destroy them.
mnst_eff: When you take battle or effect damage: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned to your field, you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Fiend-Type monsters.
eff: When you take battle or effect damage: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned to your field, you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Fiend-Type monsters.

action: Activates if you take battle damage
Activates if you take effect damage
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
